title: The Blech and the Hot Plate: Keeping Food Warm on Shabbat
title_zh: 金属盖板与电热板：如何在安息日保持食物温热
title_he: הבלך והפלטה החשמלית: שמירה על אוכל חם בשבת
description: The halachic requirements for keeping food warm on Shabbat, how to use a blech or hot plate properly, and what foods can be reheated.
author: Torah Light Project
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers, no background in Judaism
chinese_parallels: Chinese New Year dinner preparation (年夜饭)
Principle of patient preparation and letting time do its work
Family meals as centerpieces of cultural life

historical_periods_referenced.chinese: Han Dynasty to Jin Dynasty (汉朝至晋朝)

key_concepts: Ein bishul achar bishul (no cooking after cooking)
